discrepancies.title: 017c D_branch_plus median (BLOCKED) differs from 017f single-config recomputation
discrepancies.interpretation: 017c flagged QL09 D extraction as BLOCKED (D_half_range/|D_median| ratio ~10^11). The 017c median is therefore not a meaningful estimate of D; my 017f single-config value is also not a meaningful estimate. This is consistent with 017c's 'D consistent with zero / K-sensitivity divergent' soft halt. The |D| RATIO invariant in invariant_comparison.json is therefore NOT a basis-independence test in the strong sense; both values are noise-floor.
discrepancies.action: Do not treat |D| RATIO as evidence for or against any classification. Phase D classification is driven by |a_1| only. D extraction would require longer series (e.g. dps=400 N=5000), which is out-of-scope for 017f.
